name: difflore
description: DiffLore team knowledge injection into coding sessions via MCP and lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Inject team rules into coding sessions.
interface.longDescription: DiffLore captures and retrieves team coding rules, then injects relevant guidance into coding-agent sessions through MCP tools and lifecycle hooks.
defaultPrompt: Find relevant team rules for the file I am editing.
Explain why this rule was injected.
Show me rule changes since my last sync.
